case_title: CARL FAGERLIN VS. FOUR SOFT INERNATIONAL, INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAGERLIN, CARL AS TO DEFENDANT FOUR SOFT INERNATIONAL, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FAGERLIN, CARL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOUR SOFT INERNATIONAL, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $24,897.14 PRINCIPAL, $440.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,338.09, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
